title: Feur Skyland
description: [Vanilla+] Adds many flying islands to your world
body:
/!\ You look **_FEUR Skyland_** here, there is also **_Dimensional Skyland_** which offers the same content in a specific dimension. Both mods are compatible with each other !

![Feur Skyland](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f325913f812690c71b0cdb84797cb582e405b780_0.webp)

A mod that adds many flying islands above your classic generation to add new content to your sky !
Adds islands, villagers' houses, forests and fields
